name: Incorrect Behavior Order: Validate Before Filter
description: The product validates input before applying filters that strip or modify characters, allowing attackers to provide input that passes validation but becomes dangerous after the filter removes characters (e.g., 'scr<blocked>ipt' becoming 'script' after tag stripping).
detection_pattern: CONTROL[input_validation] runs before TRANSFORM[filter_strip] that removes characters, so input passes validation in pre-filtered form then becomes dangerous in post-filtered form at EGRESS or EXTERNAL, without reordering to filter-then-validate
